patterns.message: Close to multi-day storm: 39cm over 4 days (needs 3cm/day minimum).
Wind slab risk Day 4: 27 km/h wind with 18cm recent snow. Wind loading on north aspects.
Cold snap Day 13: 7°C drop to -6°C. Great for powder preservation.
